query:
SELECT 
  DATE(paid_at) AS paid_date,
  SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total_amount,
  SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS close_sum,
  SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS bad_debt_sum,
  SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) 
    - SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2)))
    - SUM(CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS installment_sum
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  AND DATE(paid_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-04-05'
GROUP BY DATE(paid_at)
ORDER BY paid_date;
